title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Motors

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Motors
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!
